# mixpanel_behavior (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# A saved behavior. `definition` is a Mixpanel behavior document passed through
# verbatim as JSON.
resource "mixpanel_behavior" "power_users" {
  project_id  = 1234567
  name        = "Power users"
  description = "Users who performed a key action 5+ times"
  definition  = jsonencode({ behavior = {} })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `behavior_id` (Number)
- `behaviors` (String)
- `definition` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `project_id` (Number)
- `type` (String)
